title: CSS Filters and Effects
description: Apply CSS filter functions to create image effects: blur, brightness, grayscale, and drop-shadow
html:
Blurred
Bright
Grayscale
Shadow

hints.text: CSS filter functions have specific parameter formats. blur() uses pixels, brightness() uses a multiplier or percentage, and the shadow filter is not called 'box-shadow'.
blur(4px) not em. brightness(1.5) or 150%. grayscale(100%) not 1%. drop-shadow() not box-shadow().
Fix units and function names: blur(4px), brightness(1.5), grayscale(100%), drop-shadow(4px 4px 8px black)
